{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044827F1AC820866D2A0525022"}"},"total":1357},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594849525199799065","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的小说！主角有空间但是不是那种“”有空间就一路爽爽爽，别人逃命主角涮火锅喝奶茶”的小说，主角很努力很努力的在生存。作者真的很会写，每一次主角的行动很符合逻辑，而且主角也不是独狼，文中的一些配角也都在努力生活。总之是很好的一本小说！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768316169,"group_id":"7548699456502254654","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9cUzKsW7w9brv10hyDkZdRTaRZLwfw9iIYA74hkaH1g","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1073601469746028","user_name":"米迪莉娅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1073601469746028","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548699456502254654","book_info":{"abstract":"徐小言是个超市仓库管理员，某天突然拥有了一个空间，她怀疑末世将临，所以开始疯狂囤货，后经历疫情、虫灾、高温、地震等一系列灾难后，跟随救助者到幸存者基地，但基地资源匮乏，人性面临考验，她谨慎使用空间能力，在末世尽量过好自己的日子。

写在前面的话
本文无CP，女主毕竟是一个人，很多时候会选择群居以保障自身安全，末世，一个女子如果不选择抱团的话，很容易处于被欺辱的下场，所以女主努力跟随相对有秩序的军队，尽量保障自身的安全，至于空间，只有确保周围没人的情况下，女主才敢使用，木秀于林风必催之，这个金手指是她的保命符，一旦泄露，就会变成催命符。

女主不圣母，所有决定都以自身安危为先，至于很多人奇怪为什么空间里大部分都只存方便面、压缩饼干之类的生存物资，而不是各种美食，统一解释下，因为在女主徐小言的概念里，活着是第一要务，末世人人饥不果腹的情况下，你一个人吃的油光满面，那不照样要成为靶子嘛！她所考虑的，首先是确保自己不饿死，然后在活着的前提下努力比别人活得更好，争做一个不显眼，不拔尖，不刺头的小平民！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/829325bcb7ef49d2fdad4e4396e346bb","author":"纹曲","author_id":"","book_id":"7548699456502254654","book_name":"末世囤货求生记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a8a8a8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548708591679586878","read_count":"52013","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"861554"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"335","tags":"科幻末世,空间,末世,无CP,囤物资,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ca24a3c0c6642f08b48e980233f15fa5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310107&x-signature=f3btLT2SWWCi2mL2nFv2dSD8%2Brg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"452625628674148","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"279"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044827F1AC820866D2A0525022"}"},"rela te_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24147,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":13090},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1769329514,"author_reply_time":1769329507,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598611660295226137","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的超级超级超级好看，第一次找到这么满意的末世囤货生存文，女主有空间有大量物资的同时也在去往避难所的路上不断囤货，看的非常有安全感，在前期去往避难所的阶段不是独狼但队友都非常靠谱有分寸，而且女主塑造的特别好目前看来没有任何毒点，不会烂好心圣母什么的，做任何事情都会考虑自己的利益，希望作者后面也一直保持这种风格，之前看过不少类似的文，前期很好看但后面不是搞暧昧谈恋爱去了就是卷入一些莫名其妙的纠纷，像这本书女主在财不外露的情况下过好自己的生活日常就很好看！","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":21,"text":"末世囤货","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E5%9B%A4%E8%B4%A7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774126107A0525022%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227598611660295226137%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227548699456502254654%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E5%9B%A4%E8%B4%A7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":49,"s":46,"text":"避难所","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%81%BF%E9%9A%BE%E6%89%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774126107A0525022%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227598611660295226137%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227548699456502254654%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%81%BF%E9%9A%BE%E6%89%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestam
